name: 갑수
visual_description: An elderly man in his 60s, wearing an old, carefully ironed postman's vest over a worn-out undershirt. His face is etched with worry and anticipation. He stares intently, his eyes filled with a desperate hope. His hair is likely thinning and possibly graying. He has a frail appearance, and his hands tremble slightly.
consistency_prompt: Elderly Korean man in a worn postman's vest, anxious expression.
